Volcano Plot of Differential Expression Results

PlotVolcano.Rd

Produces a publication-ready volcano plot from a DEG data frame (presto, FindMarkers, or any table with logFC and adjusted p-value columns). Automatically detects column names for common output formats. Points are colored by direction × significance; top genes per direction are labelled with ggrepel.

Usage

PlotVolcano(
  deg_df,
  gene_column = NULL,
  fc_column = NULL,
  padj_column = NULL,
  group_column = NULL,
  fc_cutoff = 0.25,
  padj_cutoff = 0.05,
  top_n_labels = 10,
  highlight_genes = NULL,
  colors = c(up = "#B40426", down = "#3B4CC0", ns = "gray70"),
  point_size = 1,
  point_alpha = 0.6,
  max_overlaps = 20,
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  subset_name = ""
)

Arguments

deg_df

Data frame with differential expression results. Compatible with presto ("feature"/"logFC"/"padj") and Seurat ("gene"/"avg_log2FC"/"p_val_adj").

gene_column

Column with gene names. Auto-detected if NULL.

fc_column

Column with log fold-change. Auto-detected if NULL.

padj_column

Column with adjusted p-value. Auto-detected if NULL.

group_column

Optional metadata column to facet by (one panel per group level). NULL = no faceting.

fc_cutoff

Absolute log fold-change threshold (vertical dashed lines). Default 0.25.

padj_cutoff

Adjusted p-value significance cutoff (horizontal dashed line). Default 0.05.

top_n_labels

Number of top genes to label per direction (up and down separately). Genes ranked by \(-\log_{10}(padj) \times |logFC|\). Default 10.

highlight_genes

Character vector of specific genes to always label regardless of their ranking.

colors

Named character vector with elements "up", "down", and "ns" (not significant). Defaults to red/blue/gray.

point_size

Point size. Default 1.

point_alpha

Point transparency. Default 0.6.

max_overlaps

Maximum label overlaps passed to ggrepel. Default 20.

output_dir

Directory to save a PDF. NULL = plot only, no save.

object_name

Label prefix for the output file name.

subset_name

Optional subset label appended to the file name.

Value

A ggplot2 object (invisibly if saved). Printed to the active device.

On this page

Developed by Nourhan Abdelfattah.
